content: Just as intrinsic curiosity methods like ICM and RND push reinforcement learning agents to explore unseen environments beyond sparse extrinsic rewards, this same framework can solve a critical unaddressed gap in modern computer agents like OpenAI's CUA: current computer agents only follow explicit task instructions with no incentive to spontaneously explore alternative workflows, undocumented interface features, or hidden system shortcuts that outperform scripted or instruction-restricted behavior.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
